title: SLIP escape tests do not verify spec escaping
description: lichen/tests/slip_transport/src/main.c:148-186,239. spec/11-lci.md §17.3.1 escaping rules: 0xC0 -> 0xDB 0xDC; 0xDB -> 0xDB 0xDD. test_slip_encoding uses a packet containing no 0xC0/0xDB bytes (encode-side escaping never exercised); test_slip_escape_handling asserts only zassert_true(packets >= 0) which is vacuous, and decoded content is never checked — a swapped ESC_END/ESC_ESC mapping would pass. Fix: encode test with 0xC0/0xDB payload asserting exact wire bytes; decode test asserting packets == 1 plus decoded content (needs a test hook).
